title: Blood Meridian
author: Cormac McCarthy
content: “Whatever in creation exists without my knowledge exists without my consent.”
action: Map the blind spots in your operational territory.

title: Call of the Wild
author: Jack London
content: “He was mastered by the sheer surging of life, the tidal wave of being, the perfect joy of each muscle, joint, and sinew.”
action: Align your output with your natural strengths.

title: Death Comes for the Archbishop
author: Willa Cather
content: “The desert is a cruel place, but it is a place of clarity.”
action: Strip away comforts to force a clear decision.

title: A River Runs Through It
author: Norman Maclean
content: “Eventually, all things merge into one, and a river runs through it.”
action: Discard minor details; focus on the primary flow.

title: Roughing It
author: Mark Twain
content: “I was a great deal more important than I was now, but I did not know it.”
action: Reassess your current capacity for higher stakes.
